summary: Regression testing completed after Play.jsx refactor. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). All 11 frontend UI tests passed (100%). The refactor successfully split Play.jsx from 339 lines into 227 lines with 4 sub-components + useGameState hook. No regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Play.jsx refactor successful: 339 → 227 lines with 4 sub-components (PlayerPanel, ControlsPanel, HistoryPanel, ResultOverlay)
Empty try/catch blocks now log in dev mode (console.debug with NODE_ENV check)
List keys properly prefixed (e.g., key={`player-${p}`}, key={`move-${i}-${m.flat}`})
Backend _period_filter() made explicit with cutoff: Optional[datetime] = None
Test file session tokens moved to env vars with safe defaults
All data-testid attributes preserved after refactor
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression testing after refactor complete. Play.jsx now uses useGameState hook and 4 sub-components. All backend APIs working (32 tests). All frontend flows verified (landing, lobby, play modes, theme/sound toggles, leaderboard, replay, profile redirect). Test credentials in env vars with safe defaults.

backend: GET /api/leaderboard - returns seeded users sorted by score
GET /api/users/stats/{user_id} - returns stats with by_board and by_mode
GET /api/auth/me with valid token - returns user data
GET /api/games/saved returns null when no saved game
POST /api/games/saved with valid token saves game
POST /api/replays with auth creates replay with user name
frontend: Landing page - hero title, PLAY NOW CTA, LEADERBOARD link, quickstart, stats
Lobby page - size options (3×3×3, 4×4×4), 5 mode options, Launch Match button
Play page (local_2p) - play-screen, player-panel, controls-panel, history-panel, turn-indicator, undo-btn visible
Play page (ai_easy) - AI player row with AI label, undo-btn disabled (cursor-not-allowed)
Play page (4x4x4 local_3p) - 3 player rows displayed
Theme toggle (nav-theme-toggle) - adds 'light' class to html, persists in localStorage 'cube3_theme'
Leaderboard page - 12 filter chips, all 6 seeded users displayed (Nova, Orion, Zen, Lyra, Axel, Kai)
Profile page without auth - redirects to /
